1903740.name: RPG Maker MZ - Futuristic Atmospheres
1903740.description:
Is your game missing a bit of atmosphere?

The Futuristic Atmospheres music pack by composer Joel Steudler features 15 ambient soundscapes that set the stage for exploring abandoned spaceships, surviving the apocalypse, blade running, bug hunting, and plugging into whatever matrix your game requires. These creepy, eerie, desolate, and dark tracks are a scifi toolbox you can use to construct memorable moods.

This music pack contains:
15 atmospheric soundscapes
Over 30 minutes of total music

BGM List:

01.Alien_Underworld
02.Chrysalis_Chamber
03.Derelict_Starship
04.Empty_City
05.Forbidden_Zone
06.Hatching_Grounds
07.Lone_Explorer
08.Nebula_Cloud
09.Outer_Reaches
10.Radioactive_Wastes
11.Replicant_Police
12.Scanner_Sweep
13.Technoquirk
14.Uncharted_Reaches
15.Xenomorphs
1903740.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
